DISCOVERY 610, AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER AS TO: DEPOSITIONS, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET #1), SUPPLEMENTAL FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET #1), SUPPLEMENTAL REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET #1), AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS (SET #1) AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVER LEE. GRANTED IN PART. THE MOTION IS MOOT AS TO THE DEPOSITION OF OLIVER LEE IN LIGHT OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AS TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS. CHAN. NOT REPORTED.
